title: Elytra Chestplates
description: Datapack and resourcepack for merging elytra and chestplates.
body:
![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oQQRBqCp/images/99221c31d70efa44975135f8c0eaf27a0e21c9e2.png)

Craft an elytra chestplate by combining a chestplate, elytra, and phantom membrane in a smiting table!

When using the accompanying datapack:
- Displays Elytra along with chestplates when using elytra chestplates
- Armor trims are supported but have no effect on the elytra (due to the elytra potentially displaying capes)
- Includes textures for broken (1 durability left) elytra chestpates
